falsification_rules: The H I structure hypothesis is challenged if low_A_gov systems have no higher H I disturbance than high_A_gov systems. | Formally: median(S_HI_disturbance | A_gov < 0.33) <= median(S_HI_disturbance | A_gov >= 0.67).

The large-sample maturity proxy is challenged if high stellar-surface-density galaxies do not have higher median A_proxy than low-surface-density galaxies. | The proxy framing is invalid if it is reported as A_gov_inferred or direct BDVR activation.

The bridge interpretation is challenged if fast rotators do not have higher median bridge_response_proxy than slow rotators. | The bridge framing is invalid if reported as disk A_gov_inferred or as a per-galaxy tuned BDVR coefficient.

The pressure-channel extension is challenged if slow rotators do not have higher median pressure response than fast rotators. | The spheroid mapping remains incomplete until true dynamical-excess/lensing/X-ray mass observables are tested. | The pressure framing is invalid if reported as disk v_flat or A_gov_inferred.

The governor maturity interpretation is challenged if high-maturity proxy systems routinely remain gas-dominated. | The governor maturity interpretation is challenged if low-maturity proxy systems routinely have low gas fractions and high molecular organization. | This M15 test transfers the M9 SPARC-derived threshold surface without re-fitting only as a proxy activation flag.
